prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mazda FE3 2.0L DOHC 16V (from the Mazda MX-5 NB) with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a Tomei 4-2-1 header, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping to handle 300+ hp at 10 psi boost
Full drivetrain reinforcement with a MazdaSpeed 6-speed transmission swap, OS Giken Super Lock differential, and custom axles from Driveshaft Shop to handle increased torque

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Mazda Capella/626-specific valving), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for chassis rigidity
estetica: Custom Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (Persona-specific, not a generic FD or RX-7 kit) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and duckbill rear wing for aggressive stance and aero balance

Full respray in Mazda's original 'Sunlight Silver Metallic' (code 14A) with a 3M Matte Clear Coat overlay, paired with custom vinyl graphics in 'Mazdaspeed Racing' livery (black, red, and white accents)

Interior retrofit with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Mazda Capella/626-specific mounts), Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel, and a full carbon fiber dash overlay with a digital gauge cluster from Defi (including boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR readouts)
